---
title: "Effects of gentrification on educational inequalities"
description: "GENTRED studies how urban gentrification shapes school segregation and educational inequalities in Barcelona."
image: "images/Logo_bicolor.png"
image-alt: "Gentred project logo"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
body-attrs: "class=index-page" # Adds a class called "index-page" to the body
format:
  html:
    css: index-styles.css
---

![](images/Logo_bicolor.svg){.logo-animated fig-align="center"}

::: {.home-partners style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap;"}
<img src="images/geps-logo.png" style="margin-right: 5px;"/> ![](images/logotip-versio-5-verd-1401x564.png){width="174"}
:::

**Research project funded by**

::: {.home-funding style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;"}
<img src="images/logo_fund.png" style="margin-top: 10px;"/>
:::

```{=html}
<script defer src="https://cdn.overtracking.com/t/tJ4dxONKAlXCjw0k8/"></script>
```
